subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter hath reached the Most Holy Court and hath been honored with the glance of God's loving-kindness. As to that which thou didst mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله کتابت بساحت اقدس واصل و بلحاظ عنایه الله فائز و اما ما ذکرت فی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation
